description: UI Theme & Icon Updates - Change primary color to orange, replace text buttons with icons, fix dark theme consistency, and improve mobile friends page layout

userStories.title: Install Lucide React icon library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Lucide React icon library installed so that subsequent stories can use consistent, high-quality icons.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `yarn workspace web add lucide-react` to add lucide-react as a dependency in apps/web/package.json
yarn install completes successfully with no errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Change global primary color from green to orange
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to use orange as its primary accent color so that the brand identity feels warm and energetic.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the primary color in apps/web/tailwind.config.ts from #30D158 (green) to #FF9500 (orange)
All UI elements using bg-primary, text-primary, border-primary now render in orange
Find and replace any hardcoded bg-green-500/hover:bg-green-600 classes on action buttons throughout apps/web/src/ with bg-primary or the orange equivalent — but leave green for success states
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: The primary color is defined in tailwind.config.ts under theme.extend.colors.primary. Some components use bg-green-500 directly instead of bg-primary — these must be found and updated.

userStories.title: Rename home page section header to just Burn Buddies
userStories.description: As a user, I want the home page section header to simply say 'Burn Buddies' instead of 'Burn Buddies & Squads' for a cleaner label.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the <h2> text in apps/web/src/app/(main)/page.tsx from 'Burn Buddies & Squads' to 'Burn Buddies'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update home page card labels to use fire emoji
userStories.description: As a user, I want the burn buddy and burn squad card labels on the home page to say '🔥 Burn Buddy' and '🔥 Burn Squad' instead of plain 'Buddy' / 'Squad' tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the badge text in apps/web/src/app/(main)/page.tsx from 'Buddy' to '🔥 Burn Buddy' and from 'Squad' to '🔥 Burn Squad'
Badge styling remains consistent (amber for buddies, secondary/blue for squads)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This matches the convention already used on the friends page.

userStories.title: Replace + Burn Buddy and + Burn Squad text buttons with icon buttons
userStories.description: As a user, I want compact icon buttons for adding Burn Buddies and Burn Squads so that the header area looks cleaner and more modern.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace the '+ Burn Buddy' Link in apps/web/src/app/(main)/page.tsx with a Lucide UserPlus icon (single person icon)
Replace the '+ Burn Squad' Link with a Lucide UsersRound icon (group icon)
Both icon buttons retain their links to /burn-buddies/new and /burn-squads/new respectively
Both icon buttons have aria-label attributes for accessibility ('Add Burn Buddy' and 'Add Burn Squad')
Icon buttons use the orange primary color as background with white icon color (bg-primary text-white)
Icons are sized approximately h-5 w-5 with p-2 rounded-lg button wrapper
Icons have appropriate hover state (darker shade on hover)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001 (lucide-react installed) and US-002 (orange primary color).

userStories.title: Fix Add to Calendar button dark theme styling
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Add to Calendar button to match the app's dark theme instead of appearing as a jarring white button.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/web/src/components/AddToCalendarButton.tsx to use dark surface-elevated styling (bg-surface-elevated or bg-[#2C2C2E])
Text color is white (text-white)
Border matches dark theme (e.g. border-[#3A3A3C])
Hover state uses a slightly lighter dark shade (not white/gray)
The loading spinner SVG uses white or light-colored stroke for visibility on dark background
The calendar emoji or icon is clearly visible against the dark background
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Component is at apps/web/src/components/AddToCalendarButton.tsx. Currently uses bg-white with border-gray-300 — a light theme button in a dark app.

userStories.title: Fix mobile friends page row spacing and remove email
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the friends list rows on the friends page to have comfortable spacing and not display email addresses, since usernames are now supported.
acceptanceCriteria: Increase paddingVertical on friendRow style in apps/mobile/src/screens/FriendsScreen.tsx to 12 and add paddingHorizontal of 14 to match home page card spacing
Remove the <Text style={styles.friendEmail}>{friend.email}</Text> element from friend rows
Remove the friendEmail style definition from the StyleSheet
Friend rows are visually less smushed — closer to home page list card spacing
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Home page cards use paddingVertical: 12, paddingHorizontal: 14. Friends page currently uses paddingVertical: 10 with no horizontal padding.
